name: Fox Hollow Training Center
about: Fox Hollow Training Center is a comprehensive golf practice facility and instructional hub designed for players of all levels to improve their game. The center is equipped with 60+ hitting stations, 20 of which are fully covered for all-weather use, and features brand new golf balls, mats, and exact yardage markers to targets. It offers a value-driven approach with some of the lowest bucket prices in the region, complemented by well-lit driving and short game areas, including specialized "up lighting" for enhanced evening visibility and a dedicated wedge target course for short-game practice.
why_golfers_like_it: Extensive value with low bucket prices and top-tier range ball quality
Premium TrackMan launch monitor technology for accurate data and club fittings
60+ all-weather hitting stations including 20 covered bays
Dedicated short game area with wedge target course for shots 80 yards and in

food_and_drink.notes: Full service food and beverage operation available on-site.
Alcoholic beverages are available at the facility's food and beverage operation.

simulator_hardware.notes: Used for club fittings and instruction by PGA professionals like John Rosecrans.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the practice facilities and hitting stations.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as the facility has a full-service food and beverage operation on-site.

faq.question: How long is a typical simulator session or 18 holes on the range?
faq.answer: Simulator session and 18-hole times are not specified. Please call the facility for details on booking range time or using the launch monitor for practice sessions.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is kid-friendly and offers junior golf programs and a Junior Golfer Annual Pass, making it suitable for families.
